description: Complete parser, Avro writer, and tests for enum, date, time, and timestamp logical types

steps.title: Implement enum converter and Avro writer
steps.description: Add convert_enum() to converters.go that validates value is in permitted_values. Add EnumTypeConfig case to map_type_json in avro_writer.go producing {"type":"enum","name":"<field_name>","symbols":[...]}. Note: map_type_json needs access to field name for enum schema.
acceptance_criteria: convert_enum returns value string when in permitted_values
convert_enum returns error when value not in permitted_values
Avro schema generated with enum type, name from field, symbols from permitted_values

steps.title: Create enum test fixtures and tests
steps.description: Create fixtures: enum_basic, enum_case_insensitive, enum_value_remap, enum_multiple_representations, enum_invalid_value, enum_mixed_types. Add corresponding test functions.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 enum tests pass
Case-insensitive input works via regex representation
Value remapping via static args works
Invalid enum value produces error

steps.title: Implement date converter and Avro writer
steps.description: Add convert_date() to converters.go that takes year/month/day args, validates them, and returns days since Unix epoch as int32. Add DateTypeConfig case to map_type_json returning {"type":"int","logicalType":"date"}.
acceptance_criteria: convert_date returns correct days-since-epoch for valid dates
convert_date returns error for invalid dates (month 13, Feb 29 non-leap, etc.)
Avro schema has int type with date logicalType

steps.title: Create date test fixtures and tests
steps.description: Create fixtures: date_iso, date_custom_format, date_invalid_components, date_mixed_types. Add corresponding test functions.
acceptance_criteria: All 4 date tests pass
ISO and custom formats produce same output
Invalid date components produce error

steps.title: Implement time converter and Avro writer
steps.description: Add convert_time() to converters.go that takes hour/minute/second/millisecond/microsecond args (with defaults), validates ranges, and returns microseconds since midnight as int64. Add TimeTypeConfig case to map_type_json returning {"type":"long","logicalType":"time-micros"}.
acceptance_criteria: convert_time returns correct microseconds for valid times
Missing time args default to 0
Fractional seconds handled correctly
Avro schema has long type with time-micros logicalType

steps.title: Create time test fixtures and tests
steps.description: Create fixtures: time_iso, time_fractional_seconds, time_custom_format, time_edge_cases. Add corresponding test functions.
acceptance_criteria: All 4 time tests pass
Fractional seconds with varying precision work
Edge cases (midnight, 23:59:59) work

steps.title: Implement timestamp converter and Avro writer
steps.description: Add convert_timestamp() to converters.go supporting two parameter sets: (1) component-based with year/month/day/hour/minute/second/millisecond/microsecond/timezone args, (2) epoch-based with value/offset/precision args. Returns microseconds since epoch UTC as int64. Add TimestampTypeConfig case to map_type_json returning {"type":"long","logicalType":"timestamp-micros"}.
acceptance_criteria: Component-based conversion produces correct UTC microseconds
Epoch-based conversion with precision arg works
Timezone offset correctly applied to produce UTC output
Missing optional args default correctly
Avro schema has long type with timestamp-micros logicalType

steps.title: Create timestamp test fixtures and tests
steps.description: Create fixtures: timestamp_iso_offset, timestamp_iso_utc, timestamp_custom_format, timestamp_epoch, timestamp_timezone_conversion, timestamp_invalid. Add corresponding test functions.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 timestamp tests pass
Timezone conversion to UTC works
Epoch-based conversion with precision works
Invalid components produce error

steps.title: Walking skeleton: all new types combined test
steps.description: Create all_new_types_mixed fixture with enum, date, time, and timestamp fields alongside string and integer. Add test_all_new_types_mixed test.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 logical types (string, integer, decimal existing + enum, date, time, timestamp new) work together
Full pipeline processes all types in single run
